initiatives.name: Michigan Solidarity Bail Fund
initiatives.description: The Michigan Solidarity Bail Fund is a project to bail out those most in need and those who put themselves at risk fighting for our collective freedom.

initiatives.name: Michigan Liberation
initiatives.description: We are a statewide network of people & organizations fighting to end the criminalization of black families & communities of color in Michigan.

initiatives.name: Michigan General Defense Committee
initiatives.description: Defend the working and oppressed classes. Join the struggle, Fight for our liberation on the streets, at the workplace, and in our communities

initiatives.name: Rent Is Too Darn High
initiatives.description: Coalition for renter's rights and good housing for all

initiatives.name: Michigan for Palestine
initiatives.description: Student activist showcasing events in Michigan regarding Palestine.

initiatives.name: Michigan Divest
initiatives.description: Join us in demanding Michigan DIVEST the State Employee Retirement System from Apartheid

initiatives.name: CODEPINK Michigan
initiatives.description: Grassroots feminists using our voices to combat domestic & international social injustices.

initiatives.name: Michigan 4 Palestine
initiatives.description: All things to support Palestine happening right here in Michigan; this is the official group of the Phone Banking in Michigan initiative.

initiatives.name: MI Social Workers for Palestine
initiatives.description: Social Workers & Social Work Students using our voices to emphasize the ongoing humanitarian crises in Gaza.

initiatives.name: Michigan Abolition
initiatives.description: Michigan Abolition and Prisoner Solidarity (MAPS) is a group of abolitionists organizing in solidarity with the imprisoned against the violence of incarceration.

initiatives.name: Let Me Tell You
initiatives.description: A collection of first-person stories about the experience and impact of long imprisonment in Michigan.
